case_title: CIVIC HOLDINGS I TRUST VS. DAVID JAH

docket_entries.description: EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER AND ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE (TRANSACTION ID # 59329108) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CIVIC HOLDINGS I TRUST
MOTION TO QUASH BY LAW / SHOW CAUSE BY ORDER, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY DEFENDANT JAH, DAVID HEARING SET FOR SEP-08-2016 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 501

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT DAVID JAH'S MOTION TO QUASH BY LAW/SHOW CAUSE BY ORDER IS DENIED. THIS MOTION IS IN EFFECT AN OPPOSITION TO THE PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION APPLICATION AND LACKS ANY MERIT EITHER FOR AFFIRMATIVE RELIEF OR OPPOSING THE APPLICATION FOR A PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A [PROPOSED] WRITTEN ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: JOSE RIOS MERIDA; REPORTER: SHERRY L. SAWYER, CSR #59761, EMAIL: SSAWYER@SFTC.ORG. ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION AND APPOINTMENT OF RECEIVER HEARING SET FOR SEP-08-2016 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR MOTION TO QUASH BY LAW/SHOW CAUSE BY ORDER HEARING SET FOR SEP-08-2016 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF CIVIC HOLDING TRUST'S APPLICATION FOR A PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF HAS DEMONSTRATED A LIKELIHOOD OF PREVAILING ON THE MERITS BASED ON THE HELFRICH DECLARATION AND JUDICIALLY NOTICEABLE DOCUMENTS AND THE BALANCE OF EQUITIES AND HARMS WEIGHS IN PLAINTIFF'S FAVOR. DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO QUASH, WHICH LACKS ANY COMPETENT EVIDENCE, DOES NOT PRESENT A BASIS TO DENY THE INJUNCTION. PLAINTIFF SHALL PREPARE AN INJUNCTION ORDER THAT CORRESPONDS TO THE TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER/ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE ISSUED ON JULY 27, 2016, AND IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: JOSE RIOS MERIDA; REPORTER: SHERRY L. SAWYER, CSR #59761, EMAIL: SSAWYER@SFTC.ORG. (D302)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-29-2016 Off Calendar

Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction And Appointment Of Receiver
Off Calendar Sep-08-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Connor M. Day of Buchman Provine Brothers Smith (925-944-9700) appears telephonically as counsel for plaintiff/moving party

David Jah (213-884-3383) appeared telephonically as defendant/opposing party, In Propria Persona

Hearing is held pursuant to Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction And Appointment Of Receiver. The cause is argued and submitted by both sides as set forth in the transcript of the certified shorthand reporter. The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

Plaintiff Civic Holding Trust's application for a preliminary injunction is granted. Plaintiff has demonstrated a likelihood of prevailing on the merits based on the Helfrich declaration and judicially noticeable documents and the balance of equities and harms weighs in plaintiff's favor. Defendant's motion to quash, which lacks any competent evidence, does not present a basis to deny the injunction. Plaintiff shall prepare an injunction order that corresponds to the temporary restraining order/Order to Show Cause issued on July 27, 2016, and in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Sherry L. Sawyer, CSR #59761, email: ssawyer@sftc.org. (D302)

Motion To Quash By Law/Show Cause By Order
Off Calendar Sep-08-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Connor M. Day of Buchman Provine Brothers Smith (925-944-9700) appears telephonically as counsel for plaintiff/moving party

David Jah (213-884-3383) appeared telephonically as defendant/opposing party, In Propria Persona

The cause is argued and submitted by both sides as set forth in the transcript of the certified shorthand reporter. The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

Defendant David Jah's Motion To Quash By Law/Show Cause By Order is DENIED. This motion is in effect an opposition to the preliminary injunction application and lacks any merit either for affirmative relief or opposing the application for a preliminary injunction. Prevailing party to submit a [proposed] written order in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Sherry L. Sawyer, CSR #59761, email: ssawyer@sftc.org. (D302)

Motion To Quash By Law / Show Cause By Order

This is a not a real property matter. Judge: Angela Bradstreet; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)
